mapper.select: SELECT id, goods_id, total_stock, locked_stock, sold_count, version, updated_at FROM t_stock
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_stock (goods_id, total_stock, locked_stock, sold_count, version, updated_at) VALUES (#{goodsId}, #{totalStock}, 0, 0, 0, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_stock SET locked_stock = locked_stock - #{quantity}, sold_count = sold_count + #{quantity}, version = version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND locked_stock >= #{quantity}
